selection.comparison_basis: same 44 job ids and the same saved v4 user simulations

derived_guardrails: If source context or user goal touches adjacent but separate procedures, choose one continuous documented flow instead of building a hybrid.
Carry the procedure to the actual requested target state; the last step must reach or confirm that state, not only open the next dialog.
Keep the first and last step inside the same documented procedure when the source contains neighboring subgoals.

baseline_v4.failure_shape: mixed two adjacent procedures and stopped without a clean goal-completing finish

candidate_v5_isolated.failure_shape: over-corrected into only the direct voice-profile path and dropped the documented opening sequence for Stimmeneinstellungen

interpretation.remaining_problem_shape: The blocker stays narrow but is better described as composite-goal scoping plus completeness on hard step_by_step requests, not just a missing final step.
interpretation.next_sensible_step: Do not broaden the prompt further. Prefer collecting and shadowing a few more hard composite-goal step_by_step examples, then decide whether a more specific data-backed prompt example or rubric note is justified.
